text.div:
CT Abdomen/Pelvis without Contrast
StatusPRELIMINARY
ConclusionDiffuse thickening descending and sigmoid colon. Pericolonic stranding. Mild pneumatosis cannot be excluded. No free air. Limited evaluation of vasculature without contrast. Impression: Colitis, questionable ischemic changes in sigmoid, correlate clinically.

resource.conclusion: Diffuse thickening descending and sigmoid colon. Pericolonic stranding. Mild pneumatosis cannot be excluded. No free air. Limited evaluation of vasculature without contrast. Impression: Colitis, questionable ischemic changes in sigmoid, correlate clinically.
